_meta: Series entity schema — based on discovery analysis (16 sampled series)

columns._meta: Fields are grouped by purpose. 'nullable' means the field is not present on all series.

wiki_page_title.description: Original wiki page title — used as the unique key for upserts (e.g., 'Amazing_Spider-Man_Vol_1')

image_url.description: Full CDN URL for the series volume logo, resolved from wiki volume_logo field via MediaWiki imageinfo API

featured.description: Featured character(s) or team — cleaned from wiki links (e.g., 'Spider-Man' or 'Captain America (Burnside); Captain America (Rogers); Captain America (Simons)')

writers.description: Newline-separated list of writers with issue counts (e.g., 'Stan Lee (112 issues)\nGerry Conway (39 issues)'). Merged from writer1–writerN and writer1_issues–writerN_issues.

pencilers.description: Newline-separated list of pencilers with issue counts (e.g., 'Steve Ditko (38 issues)\nJohn Romita Sr. (64 issues)'). Merged from penciler1–pencilerN and penciler1_issues–pencilerN_issues.

previous_volume.description: Previous volume this series was renamed/relaunched from (e.g., 'X-Men Vol 1')

notes.description: Editorial notes — external links to Marvel.com, continuity notes

see_also.description: Related series, annuals, and specials — cleaned from wiki links

dropped_fields._meta: Fields from discovery that are intentionally excluded from the schema
dropped_fields.part1–partN: Issue number ranges by decade — layout/navigation chrome, no API value
dropped_fields.part1_above–partN_above: Decade section headers — HTML layout chrome
dropped_fields.part1_below–partN_below: Relaunch notes between sections — layout chrome
dropped_fields.publisher: Redundant — all entries are Marvel Comics
dropped_fields.accolades: Eisner award data — sparse (3/16), partially broken wiki template artifacts
dropped_fields.year/category1/who1/for1: Award detail fields — sparse, template artifacts leak through
dropped_fields.AnnualName/AnnualYear: Annual references — collapsed into see_also where present
dropped_fields.SpecialName/SpecialYear: Special issue references — collapsed into see_also where present

relationships._meta: These will be handled by join tables — defined separately after all entity schemas are finalized
relationships.comic_series: Foreign key on comics table pointing to this series — which issues belong to this series
relationships.series_characters: Derivable from featured field + comic appearances — may not need its own join table
